final_answer: Hi, I'm Mei Davis (80217). I'm having a really hard time financially and need some help. I'd like to return my water bottle, and also exchange my pet bed and office chair — both together — for the cheapest available versions. If you can only do one of these things, could you tell me how much I'd save from each option? I'd go with whichever saves me more. Thank you.
